module_handover.change_summary: - _ALLOWED_ROOT (single Path) replaced with _ALLOWED_ROOTS (List[Path]) containing Path.home() and Path("//ccikrnf/wrkgroup") - _safe_resolve() signature changed: removed allowed_root parameter; iterates _ALLOWED_ROOTS using UNC string-prefix check + resolve()/relative_to() fallback - Call site updated: _safe_resolve(file_path) without second argument

self_check.python39_syntax: PASS — no match/case, no X|Y union, no walrus abuse, no asyncio.TaskGroup
self_check.type_hinting: PASS — _safe_resolve(user_path: str) -> Path with full type annotations
self_check.error_handling: PASS — ValueError raised on traversal detection with descriptive message
self_check.path_safety: PASS — pathlib.Path used throughout; _ALLOWED_ROOTS list validated; UNC prefix check + resolve/relative_to fallback
self_check.security: PASS — no hardcoded keys; UNC allowlist explicitly declared; input string checked against allowlist
self_check.al_edge_cases: PASS — UNC paths handled via string prefix; non-UNC paths via resolve()+relative_to(); ValueError on mismatch
self_check.pd_policy: PASS — path traversal raises ValueError (no silent correction)
self_check.docstring: PASS — updated docstring describes new multi-root behavior
